name: IdsEdwDeaDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_in1 AS ( SELECT A.PROV_DEA_SK, A.DEA_NO, A.CMN_PRCT_SK, A.CLM_TRANS_ADD_IN, A.EFF_DT_SK, A.TERM_DT_SK, A.PROV_NM, A.ADDR_LN_1, A.ADDR_LN_2, A.CITY_NM, A.PROV_DEA_ST_CD_SK, A.POSTAL_CD, A.NTNL_PROV_ID, A.NTNL_PROV_ID_SPEC_DESC, B.CMN_PRCT_ID, B.FIRST_NM, B.LAST_NM, B.MIDINIT, A.NTNL_PROV_ID_PROV_TYP_DESC, A.NTNL_PROV_ID_PROV_CLS_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_DEA A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CMN_PRCT B ON A.CMN_PRCT_SK = B.CMN_PRCT_SK ), cte_in2 AS ( SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK, COALESCE(TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD, COALESCE(TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG ), cte_lkp AS ( SELECT cte_in1.*, cte_in2.TRGT_CD, cte_in2.TRGT_CD_NM FROM cte_in1 LEFT JOIN cte_in2 ON cte_in1.PROV_DEA_ST_CD_SK = cte_in2.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_svPostalCd AS ( SELECT cte_lkp.*, CASE WHEN cte_lkp.POSTAL_CD IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(cte_lkp.POSTAL_CD)='' THEN '' ELSE FORMAT.POSTALCD.EE(cte_lkp.POSTAL_CD) END AS svPostalCd FROM cte_lkp ), cte_svZipCd5 AS ( SELECT cte_svPostalCd.*, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte_svPostalCd.svPostalCd))=0 OR cte_svPostalCd.svPostalCd='' THEN NULL ELSE SUBSTRING(cte_svPostalCd.svPostalCd,1,5) END AS svZipCd5 FROM cte_svPostalCd ), cte_svZipCd4 AS ( SELECT cte_svZipCd5.*, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte_svZipCd5.svPostalCd))<6 OR cte_svZipCd5.svPostalCd='' THEN NULL ELSE SUBSTRING(cte_svZipCd5.svPostalCd,6,4) END AS svZipCd4 FROM cte_svZipCd5 ), cte_svValidSk AS ( SELECT cte_svZipCd4.*, CASE WHEN cte_svZipCd4.PROV_DEA_ST_CD_SK=1 OR cte_svZipCd4.PROV_DEA_ST_CD_SK=0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS svValidSk FROM cte_svZipCd4 ), final_select AS ( SELECT cte_svValidSk.PROV_DEA_SK AS DEA_SK, cte_svValidSk.DEA_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_svValidSk.CLM_TRANS_ADD_IN, cte_svValidSk.CMN_PRCT_SK, cte_svValidSk.CMN_PRCT_ID, cte_svValidSk.FIRST_NM AS CMN_PRCT_FIRST_NM, cte_svValidSk.LAST_NM AS CMN_PRCT_LAST_NM, CASE WHEN cte_svValidSk.MIDINIT IS NOT NULL THEN cte_svValidSk.MIDINIT ELSE '' END AS CMN_PRCT_MIDINIT, CASE WHEN cte_svValidSk.EFF_DT_SK IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.EFF_DT_SK)='' OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.EFF_DT_SK)='NA' OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.EFF_DT_SK)='UNK' THEN '1753-01-01' ELSE cte_svValidSk.EFF_DT_SK END AS DEA_EFF_DT_SK, dbo.trim_custom(cte_svValidSk.PROV_NM,'^','A') AS DEA_NM, dbo.trim_custom(cte_svValidSk.ADDR_LN_1,'^','A') AS DEA_ADDR_LN_1, cte_svValidSk.ADDR_LN_2 AS DEA_ADDR_LN_2, cte_svValidSk.CITY_NM AS DEA_CITY_NM, CASE WHEN cte_svValidSk.TRGT_CD IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.TRGT_CD)='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_svValidSk.TRGT_CD END AS DEA_ST_CD, cte_svValidSk.TRGT_CD_NM AS DEA_ST_NM, CASE WHEN cte_svValidSk.svValidSk=0 OR ISNUMERIC(cte_svValidSk.svZipCd5)=0 THEN NULL ELSE cte_svValidSk.svZipCd5 END AS DEA_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, CASE WHEN cte_svValidSk.svValidSk=0 OR ISNUMERIC(cte_svValidSk.svZipCd4)=0 THEN NULL ELSE cte_svValidSk.svZipCd4 END AS DEA_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, CASE WHEN cte_svValidSk.TERM_DT_SK IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.TERM_DT_SK)='' OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.TERM_DT_SK)='NA' OR dbo.trim_default(cte_svValidSk.TERM_DT_SK)='UNK' THEN '2199-12-31' ELSE cte_svValidSk.TERM_DT_SK END AS DEA_TERM_DT_SK, cte_svValidSk.NTNL_PROV_ID, cte_svValidSk.NTNL_PROV_ID_SPEC_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_svValidSk.PROV_DEA_ST_CD_SK AS DEA_ST_CD_SK, cte_svValidSk.NTNL_PROV_ID_PROV_TYP_DESC, cte_svValidSk.NTNL_PROV_ID_PROV_CLS_DESC FROM cte_svValidSk ) SELECT * FROM final_select;

Description:

                                                                                                     NTNL_PROV_ID_SPEC_DESC

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwDeaDExtr
DB2 connector brings in data from IDS tables PROV_DEA and CMN_PRCT
Data is written into a load ready SF file named as DEA_D.dat
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Code SK lookups for Denormalization
Lookup Key:
PROV_DEA_ST_CD_SK
Add Defaults and null handling
